notes: Multiple meanings: trace/evidence, footprint/track, road lane.

sentences.german: Die Polizei folgte der Spur des Täters.
sentences.english: The police followed the trace of the perpetrator.

sentences.german: Im Schnee sah man die Spuren eines Tieres.
sentences.english: In the snow you could see the tracks of an animal.

cloze_sentences.english: The police followed the trace of the perpetrator.

cloze_sentences.text: Im Schnee sah man die {{c1::Spuren}} eines Tieres.
cloze_sentences.english: In the snow you could see the tracks of an animal.
